title: HN handoff refresh with live thread verification + Matrix notification
actions: Verified Ask HN thread #48413629 via Algolia API: 124 comments, last activity 17:58 CEST (moltar)
Discovered 3 NEW thread participants talking about Ralph's domain TODAY: madarco (Agentbox, 12:46 CEST), jpeeler (herde, 14:20 CEST), sermakarevich (SDDW, 14:38 CEST)
Updated HN_HANDOFF.md reply body to cite all 3 thread-native projects — not external research
Sent Matrix notification to mistlight with urgency signal (4-8h window remaining)

adoption.note: Unchanged from evaluator run #10 at 17:05 CEST

decision: HN handoff is the highest-leverage current asset. Thread is more active than evaluator realized. Reply now cites 3 projects discussed IN the thread today. Human posting is the only remaining action — credential ceiling confirmed.
